docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: RICE, MARK JOHN SUBSTITUTED FOR LEONIDOU, JANETTE G AS ATTORNEY FOR RMR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
